sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 23:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 23:1
items.html: The coming of phase three, which is the female of the vessel of Keter to the place of Malchut of the Rosh. It causes a corresponding ascent of Malchut of the Rosh to Yesod of the Rosh, which is phase three of the Rosh. (Inner Light, Item‎ 6)
